goals: Verify the persistent memory worker service is running and healthy
Get an overview of the memory database statistics
Search for memories related to a specific topic of interest
Retrieve detailed information about a specific memory
Examine the timeline and context around a particular memory

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical. Likes to understand systems thoroughly before using them.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands AI concepts well but is new to this specific persistent memory tool

end_condition: The user has verified the system is working, explored their memory database, and examined specific memories and their context
